content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian copied a fifth-realm multi-dimensional life, and his cultivation happened to be in the late stage of the fifth-realm realm.

In an instant, he easily escaped into the tenth dimension.

After entering the tenth dimension, he didn't feel suppressed at all, as if he had returned home, the environment here was too suitable for him, but the outside environment was not suitable for him.

"It's no wonder that multidimensional life almost doesn't appear in those realms, and the environment in those territories is not suitable for multidimensional life, and it will be very awkward to stay there, and no multidimensional life likes to come out. Unless it's a last resort, or it's a fight for some treasure. "

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Tenth dimension.

Ye Tian roamed freely, like a fish entering a river or ocean, extremely fast, and his will could explore a long distance.

According to his understanding, the tenth dimension is boundless and vast, and although there are many treasures, it is not easy to find them.

And the real treasures are almost all in the depths of the tenth dimension, from those extradimensional realms to the tenth dimension, the locations that appear are all peripherals, if you want to enter the depths, you must keep hurrying.

As a result, these multi-dimensional beings are almost isolated from the outside world, and only during the multidimensional tribulation will a large number of multi-dimensional beings enter the extradimensional realm.

As time passed, Ye Tian went deeper and deeper into the tenth dimension.

Soon.

He perceived a multi-dimensional life in the sixth realm.

Most of the multidimensional beings in the sixth realm exist in the eleventh dimension, but the tenth dimension does not exist.

For example, Ye Tian has encountered it now, the other party's huge body, and the terrifying aura made Ye Tian a little suffocated.

But the other party just stared at Ye Tian, didn't care, and left directly.

For this Sixth Realm multidimensional life, Ye Tian was just a weak multidimensional life he encountered in his hurry, and there was no need to kill him.

If it were a cultivator and broke into this place, it would probably be wiped out.

This is the benefit of finding treasures as a multi-dimensional life, at least safer.

Multi-dimensional life did not give birth to civilization, these multi-dimensional life forms are all in their own way, and they also compete with each other, but as long as they do not compete for resources, there are not many killings in ordinary times.

Along.

Ye Tian also encountered several multi-dimensional lifeforms, and he avoided them a little, but nothing happened.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the depths of the tenth dimension, and only then did he find some good resource treasures.

No matter what the resources are, he will take them directly.

What he needed most now was a treasure that could refine his soul will, and he wanted to raise his soul will to the eleventh dimension.

As for the treasure that improves the dimensional rules, it is enough for him to have the dimensional rules of the Supreme Treasure Black Statue, and he doesn't need anything else for the time being.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian competed with many fifth-realm multi-dimensional beings in the depths of the tenth dimension, just to snatch more cultivation resources.

Gradually, his net worth became more and more abundant, and he often condensed a second copy body to send some resources back.

Most of the resources were of little use to him, but they could cultivate more Fifth Realms for the Terrans.

this day.

Ye Tian found a treasure that was very suitable for improving the will of the soul of the tenth dimension - the Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass!

This kind of treasure can refine the soul will, but it has a flaw, that is, it will erode the bloodline power of multi-dimensional lifeforms, which causes those multi-dimensional beings to rarely use the blood-devouring dimensional grass to refine the soul will.

But Ye Tian didn't care, he used his real body to copy his body to refine his soul will, even if it was damaged to his body, his soul will was improved, and if he shared it, other soul wills would also improve.

When the time comes, it is enough to give up the problematic copy body.

So, he was going to collect some more Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass.

However, the speed at which he collected it himself was naturally not fast, and he couldn't find too many Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass in a short period of time.

He thought about it for a moment and prepared to trade with other multidimensional beings.

Although these multi-dimensional beings do not have a civilization system, they are not stupid, and they will trade, as long as they are given enough benefits, they will take out a lot of Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass or find Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass for him.

......

"Yalei, are you really willing to trade these items with me for Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass~?"

A multi-dimensional life that looked similar to a wild cow stared at Ye Tian curiously, a little incredulous.

"Yes!"

"Okay, I'm willing to trade!"

This multidimensional life quickly took out the Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass that he had placed in the place, there were about thousands of plants, and although it was not very well preserved, it was still usable.

Ye Tian made a deal with it and obtained these Blood Devouring Dimensional Grasses.

In the following days, Ye Tian exchanged a large amount of Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass for continuous trading, and sent a copy body back to the Extradimensional Territory.

......

Territory No. 533.

Ye Tian's true body copy body had already obtained that large amount of dimensional blood devouring grass and began to refine it to improve his tenth dimensional soul will.

Rumble!!!

A stream of blood-colored energy poured into the soul will, constantly refining.

At the beginning, Ye Tian didn't perceive too much sequelae, but after refining it with the Blood Devouring Dimension for a long time, his body was filled with a bloody aura, which seemed to affect his body.

However, after he changed to a replica body, his body had no effect.

Therefore, he was not afraid, and continued to use the Blood Devouring Dimension Grass to refine the tenth dimension soul will, and the effect was very good, and the tenth dimension soul will was improved very quickly.

Gradually, Ye Tian's tenth dimensional soul will was rapidly improved with the help of the Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass.

In a flash, another thousand extradimensional epochs have passed.

Ye Tian didn't know how much Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass he had refined, but he had already raised his soul will to the limit of the tenth dimension, and he was only one step away from the first dimension.

He wanted to take advantage of the time when there were still 20 million extradimensional epochs to raise the soul will of the tenth dimension to the level of the eleventh dimension.

Temper!

Temper!

Temper!

Ye Tian consumed a large amount of Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass, and swallowed hundreds of Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass in one gulp, impacting the Eleventh Dimension.

The day is over.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's soul will, with the help of these blood devouring dimensional grasses, as well as various soul will refining methods, finally broke the shackles and made the tenth dimension soul will transform.

At every moment, his soul will is metamorphosing and sublimating, which is a sign of being promoted to the eleventh dimension.
